summary: The core/project feature is fully implemented and all 70 tests pass. The implementation covers: (1) loading an entire project into memory via load_project(), (2) writing to a new location with file reference copying via write_project(), (3) accumulated parse error reporting via ParseErrors, (4) blank project initialization via blank_project(), and (5) actionable error messages with file paths, field names, and suggestions. The DAG supports parents/ancestors/children/descendants traversal, topological ordering, cycle detection, and wildcard dependency expansion.
